Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare Part D Medication Therapy 
Management Enrollment research files. Because the files have many variables, we have included several ways for 
users to quickly find the information they need:
